title: OR in subselect causes the server to crash with segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id), amount DECIMAL(10, 2), status VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO orders (user_id, amount, status) VALUES (1, 100.00, 'completed'), (2, 150.50, 'pending');
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND (o.status = 'completed' OR o.amount > 100)) FROM users u;
key_bug_features: OR in subselect causes segmentation fault
